title: ModelCard
description: Canonical shape for a trained-adapter model card pinned to a LibV2 course. Lives at courses/<slug>/models/<model_id>/model_card.json. Provenance hashes pin the exact LibV2 artifacts the run consumed (chunks, pedagogy graph, training_specs, concept graph, vocabulary TTL) so a card is fully replayable post-hoc. Wave 89 (slm-training-2026-04-26).

model_id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier (e.g. 'qwen2-5-1-5b-tst-101-v1'). Lowercase a-z0-9, hyphen-separated tokens; no leading/trailing hyphen.

course_slug.description: LibV2 course slug this adapter was trained for. Must be a slug under LibV2/courses/.

name.description: Short human-friendly name (e.g. 'qwen2.5-1.5b'). Matches a key in Trainforge/training/base_models.py.

revision.description: Pinned HF revision/tag/sha so reruns resolve the same weights.

adapter_format.description: Storage format of the trained weights. safetensors=PEFT/LoRA adapter; gguf=llama.cpp serving weights; merged_safetensors=full merged model.

seed.description: RNG seed used for the run.

gradient_accumulation_steps.description: Number of micro-batches accumulated before an optimizer step.

warmup_ratio.description: Fraction of training used for learning-rate warmup.

target_modules.description: Module names targeted by LoRA adapters.

use_4bit.description: Whether training loads the base model with 4-bit quantization.

min_dpo_pairs.description: Minimum filtered preference pairs required before DPO is enabled.

dpo_preference_filter.description: Preference-pair filter used before the DPO stage.

dpo_fail_hard.description: Whether a DPO-stage failure fails the run instead of falling back to SFT.

pedagogy_graph_hash.description: SHA-256 of the pedagogy graph artifact (pedagogy/model.json or equivalent).

concept_graph_hash.description: SHA-256 of the concept graph artifact (graph/edges.jsonl or equivalent).

vocabulary_ttl_hash.description: SHA-256 of the SHACL vocabulary TTL the run pinned to.

holdout_graph_hash.description: Wave 92: SHA-256 over the canonicalised holdout split JSON used to seed Tier-2 eval. Pins the exact set of withheld edges + their Bloom stratification so the eval harness can be replayed against any future model version.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the card was emitted.

faithfulness.description: Answer-vs-graph faithfulness score in [0, 1]. Wave 91 emits this.

coverage.description: Fraction of held-out objectives the trained model can answer correctly.

baseline_delta.description: Trained-minus-baseline score on the same prompt set. Negative = regression.

hallucination_rate.description: Wave 102: 1 - faithfulness, surfaced as its own metric for the ablation table.

source_match.description: Wave 102: fraction of probes where the model cited the ground-truth chunk_id.

calibration_ece.description: Wave 102: optional shadow copy of the eval_report calibration ECE for verifier consumption.

profile.description: Wave 102: the eval profile name the report was scored under (e.g. rdf_shacl, generic).

scoring_commit.description: Wave 102: 40-char SHA-1 commit pinned by reproduce_eval.sh; verify_eval re-checks the working tree against this.

eval_config_hash.description: Wave 103: SHA-256 of the canonical-JSON eval_config.yaml (per-course or default). verify_eval re-hashes the on-disk config and asserts equality before publishing scores.

eval_prompt_template_hash.description: Wave 103: SHA-256 of the prompt_template.txt the ablation runner used. verify_eval re-hashes the on-disk template and asserts equality.

benchmark.description: Wave 103: ED4ALL-Bench branding. Locked to 'ED4ALL-Bench' for this release.

tolerance_band.description: Wave 102: per-metric absolute-tolerance bands the verifier accepts before emitting DRIFT (e.g. {accuracy: 0.0, faithfulness: 0.05, hallucination_rate: 0.05, source_match: 0.0}).

headline_table.description: Wave 102: optional shadow of the headline 4-row ablation table (base | base+RAG | adapter | adapter+RAG).

retrieval_method_table.description: Wave 102: optional shadow of the 5-row retrieval-method ablation table (one row per LibV2 method preset).

per_property_accuracy.description: Wave 111 / Phase E: per-property accuracy from PerPropertyEvaluator. Keys are property IDs from the course's property manifest (e.g. sh_datatype, owl_sameas); values are 0..1 floats or null when unscored. Surfaces the same numbers EvalGatingValidator gates on so an audit can replay why a promotion was blocked.

license.description: SPDX identifier or short license name for the trained adapter (the base model has its own license, not declared here).

description.description: Optional human-readable summary of the model.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for catalog surfacing.
